--- format.go (before)
+++ format.go (after)
@@
 package sample
 
-func add(a int, b int) int { return a - b }
+func add(a int, b int) int { return a + b }
--- extra.go (before)
+++ extra.go (after)
@@
 package sample
 
-func sub(a int, b int) int { return a + b }
+func sub(a int, b int) int { return a - b }
